summary: Iteration 40 - v7.0.0 Final Deep Verification PASSED. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: v6.0.0 in footer, Settings > Advanced > Telegram shows all 7 alert toggles, Morning Briefing button present. All 6 bug fixes from v6.0.0 audit verified.

context_for_next_testing_agent: v7.0.0 Final Deep Verification COMPLETE. All 13 API routes tested and working. All 6 bug fixes from v6.0.0 audit verified. Ready for v7.0.0 release. Key features: 8 AI Guards, Exit Advisor, Morning Briefing, Kelly Criterion position sizing, Options Greeks, Telegram with 7 alert types. Market is currently CLOSED (Saturday).
